svg.title: Guest documents printing workflow
svg.desc: **Process.** The queue-driven printing process that produces confirmation slips, check-in folios, check-out bills, and cancellation notices. It supports batch printing for tomorrow/selected dates and individual reprints by date/guest/reservation selection.

g.text: Confirmation slips · Check-in folios · Check-out bills · Cancellation notices
Find by date, guest, or reservation.
Guest notes are kept off all printed outputs. Confirm printer is loaded
After printing: queue clears and a print log entry is recorded for audit.
